K. Verma Designation: Professor & Head Employee ID: 160 Qualification: Ph.D. Date of Joining: 18/02/1988 : +91-731-2582200,201 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. H.K. Verma is a professor and Head of the Department of Electrical Engineering. He has more than 34 years of experience of teaching and research. His present area of research includes Power system, optimization (soft computing), control system, and Drives. He has published more than twenty six papers in refereed international journals. He has also presented more than fifty research articles in national and international conferences. He is a member of ISTE and IE (India). Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree/ Specialization Year University/Institute Division 1 Ph. D. 1997 DAVV, Indore - 2 M.E. 1992 DAVV, Indore First 3 B.E. 1986 APSU, Rewa First Work Experience: S. No. Designation Department Employer Name Duration of Employment 1 Professor Electrical Engineering Shri G. S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore June 2007- Present 2 Reader Electrical Engineering Shri G. S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore June 1999 to May 2007 3 Lecturer Electrical Engineering Shri G. S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore Feb 1988 to June 1999 Research Details: Power Systems Electrical Drives Optimization Techniques Renewable Energy PhD Supervision: (a) Ph. D. Scholar Guidance: (I) Ph.D. Completed and Awarded: 1 . Research work on “Design of Three- Phase Squirrel – Cage AC Traction Motor with Aluminum alloy Rotor Bars on Inverter Supply” by Dr. R. N. Paul (Ph.D. Awarded in 2012) from R.G.P.V. Bhopal. 2. Research work on “ Optimal Automatic Generation Control” , by Ms. Chestha Jain (Ph.D Awarded in 2019) from R.G.P.V. Bhopal as Co-supervisor. (II) Ph.D. Underprocess: i. Supervising Ms. Ritu Saxena (Ph.D. Pursuing) from R.G.P.V. Bhopal. ii. Supervising Mr. Animesh Masih (Ph.D. Pursuing) from R.G.P.V. Bhopal. iii. Supervising Mr.Ashutosh Kashiv (Ph.D. Completed ) from R.G.P.V. Bhopal. iv. Supervising Ms. Prachi Mafidar (Ph.D. Completed) from R.G.P.V. Bhopal. v. Supervising Ms. Rinki Keswani (Ph.D. Pursuing) ) from R.G.P.V. Bhopal. vi. Supervising Mr. Rakesh Jha (Ph.D. Pursuing) ) from R.G.P.V. Bhopal. vii. Supervising Mr. Vineet Mishra (Ph.D. Pursuing) ) from R.G.P.V. Bhopal. viii. Supervising Mr. Firoz Khan (Ph.D. Pursuing) ) from R.G.P.V. Bhopal. Verma “Teaching-Learning-Based Optimization Algorithm for Parameter Identification”, JIE (India), accepted for publication November 2013. Dr. H. K. Verma, Ms. P.
